description: Targeted additions to fix the failure modes seen at call_f1=58%. Merge with oa_scenarios.json (see scripts/merge_scenarios.py) or load both via --scenarios scenarios/oa_scenarios.json scenarios/oa_scenarios_v2_patch.json.

rationale.leave_type_drift: Model defaulted to type=personal when user said '年假/病假/婚假'. Adding 60+ scenarios with EXPLICIT type words next to context that forces the right enum.
rationale.false_positive_business_trip: Model called submit_business_trip for '订机票'. Add 25+ no-tool scenarios that look like business trips but aren't actionable.
rationale.date_range_truncation: Multi-day requests (下周一到周三) only captured start_date. Add 30 explicit ranges with both endpoints.
rationale.chinese_name_garbling: BPE vocab 8192 lacks rare chars. Workaround: use common surnames + give the model more exposure. Real fix is a new tokenizer (out of scope).
rationale.missing_optional_fields: Model added optional urgency='medium' even when not specified. Train it to omit unspecified optionals.
